holdings.infoBox: GSEE is an equity ETF with a total of 1868 individual holdings. The top holdings are Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Company stock at 13.18%, Samsung Electronics at 7.63%, SK hynix at 6.44%, Tencent Holdings at 2.58%, and Alibaba Group Holding at 1.76%.

overview.description: The Goldman Sachs MarketBeta Emerging Markets Equity ETF (GSEE) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund tracks an index of emerging market equities, selected and weighted by market capitalization. GSEE was launched on May 12, 2020 and is issued by Goldman Sachs.
